title: Dark Reaper campaign
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Youmay|the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]] campaign|the [[Dark Reaper crisis]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]}} {{Campaign |prev=[[Duel in the Iron Citadel (Exar Kun)|Second Duel in the Iron Citadel]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |conc= |next=[[Battle of the Chazwa system (Great Sith War)|Battle of the Chazwa system]] |image=[[File:Dark_Reaper_campaign.jpg]] |name=Dark Reaper campaign |conflict=[[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]] ([[Krath Holy Crusade]]) |begin=[[3996 BBY]] |end=3996 BBY |date= |place=*[[Makem system]] *[[Raxus Prime/Legends|Raxus Prime]] |result=*Dark Reaper eventually disabled, and pieces scattered *Countless [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] casualties. |battles=*[[Battle of the Makem system (Great Sith War)|Battle of the Makem system]] *[[Battle of Raxus Prime (Great Sith War)|Battle of Raxus Prime]] |side1=[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] |side2=[[Brotherhood of the Sith]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=*Presumably [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] |commanders2=*[[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]] *[[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |forces1=*Jedi |forces2=*[[Dark Reaper]] *[[Sith/Legends|Sith]] legions |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=*Untold damage. *Unknown number of Jedi and Republic casualties. |casual2=*[[Dark Reaper]] |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|During the Great Sith War, our enemies constructed a weapon so powerful, no army could stand against it. It was known as… the Dark Reaper.|[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]|[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' video game]]}} The '''Dark Reaper campaign''' was the first extended campaign by the newly christened [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]], and his [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]], the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]]. ==History== {{Quote|The Reaper required tremendous amounts of energy to function, so the Sith crafted a device that harvested the living force to provide its power.|[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]|}} The [[Dark Reaper]] weapon itself consisted of two separate components: the Reaper's weaponry and the "[[Force Harvester]]" which powered it. After continued excavation on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]] chanced upon several weapons of the ancient Sith Lords from the defeated [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]]. The most powerful of these weapons was the Dark Reaper. This [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] had the power to focus [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] into beams of energy to cause massive damage. This sucking of the Force also created a type of death threshold around the Dark Reaper which killed anyone within range of it. ===Great Sith War=== {{Quote|How was the Reaper defeated?''"
"''A fallen Jedi Knight named Ulic Qel-Droma taught the Jedi how to withstand the Reaper's effects. After the war, all information about the Reaper, including Ulic's secrets, were lost. The Jedi scattered the remaining pieces to the far corners of the galaxy.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]|}} [[File:Dark_Reaper_Great_Sith_War.jpg|thumb|left|210px|The [[Dark Reaper]] during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]]] Apparently claiming a great number of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] lives before it was defeated, the device aided Ulic and the Sith fleet in capturing a large portion of space around the Empress Teta system. Ulic [[Battle of Raxus Prime (Great Sith War)|unleashed]] the Reaper on the Republic staging planet of [[Raxus Prime/Legends|Raxus Prime]], killing thousands. A [[Battle of Thule (Great Sith War)|battle]] was fought on the world of [[Thule/Legends|Thule]], deep within the old [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]]. In a calculated strike, a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] task force staged an attack on the [[Dark Reaper]] and using Ulic's information, were able to disable the weapon. Breaking the deadly device apart, the Republic made great effort to hide the pieces on a myriad of different planets. They then hid the power source of the Dark Reaper, the Force Harvester, on the junkyard world of Raxus Prime. ===Legacy=== {{Main|Dark Reaper crisis}} {{Quote|If Dooku restores the Dark Reaper, it will mean the end of the Republic.|[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]|}} [[File:Ulics_Tomb.jpg|thumb|right|250px|[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] speaks with [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma's]] [[Force ghost/Legends|spirit]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]]] During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] and his [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Cydon Prax]] scoured Raxus Prime for the Force Harvester. It was vital in the quest to reconstruct the Dark Reaper as part of the greater scheme to destroy the Galactic Republic. Dooku instructed Cydon Prax to activate the Force Harvester to destroy the forest on one of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk's]] moons as a test of its power. The wave of energy killed roughly half of the thriving forest on the moon, along with its indigenous population. Count Dooku then departed and discovered the remnants of the Dark Reaper. The exact locations are not mentioned, but [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] mentioned that it was separated into the farthest reaches of the galaxy. The [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] forces congregated on and around Thule, where Dooku activated the Dark Reaper in an ancient Sith city on the planet. On [[Rhen Var/Legends|Rhen Var]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] journeyed to the grave of the long-dead Ulic Qel-Droma for information on how to withstand the effects of the Dark Reaper and the Force Harvester. Shortly after the revival of the Dark Reaper, Skywalker led an attack on the city, destroying the weapon, disobeying an order from [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] to await Republic backup forces. Despite Anakin's almost single-handed defeat of the Reaper weapon, his feats in these battles served to fuel his ego and create an even greater personal rift between himself and his master. ==Behind the scenes== According to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'', the Dark Reaper was destroyed on Raxus Prime during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]].''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' {{Codex}} *[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' video game]] {{1stm}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] {{Imo}} *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] *''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]'' *{{CSWECite|I||Dark Reaper}} *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' {{1stID|Dark Reaper campaign}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GreatSithWarNav}} {{Interlang |es=Campaña de la Segadora Oscura }} [[Category:Campaigns of the Krath Holy Crusade during the Great Sith War]] {{RelatedCategories |[[Category:Battles of the Dark Reaper campaign]] }}
